title: Wockhardt Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Wockhardt Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Wockhardt Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wockhardt Hospitals:
Wockhardt Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals!
